content.text:
[cron:8157ed89-ee52-482d-a791-31181c4fff11 evening-email-review-and-calendar-check] Review the Gmail inbox of atlas.ia.agente@gmail.com with a strict evening pass. Only capture: (1) unresolved items that still matter today, (2) deadlines within the next 3 days, (3) anything that clearly rolls into tomorrow. Keep it lightweight. If a calendar action is obvious, organize it briefly toward toledo970501@gmail.com; do not over-process. Then send Gustavo a concise WhatsApp evening paneo to +573183718246 with max 5 bullets and the single most important thing for tomorrow.
Current time: Wednesday, April 1st, 2026 — 7:00 PM (America/Bogota) / 2026-04-02 00:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
